Hours:
Mon - Sun: 00:00 - 23:59

Charging Hours: Only within trading hours

GeneralComments:
Situated on the waterfront of the idyllic Harbour Island peninsula in Gordon’s Bay, Krystal Beach boasts breath-taking panoramic sea views, luxury Gordon’s Bay accommodation,

At Krystal Beach, guests have the choice of 112 elegant rooms and suites, each with their own mountain or marina view, modern furnishings and convenient amenities.

Dining at Krystal Beach takes place at the ever-popular Krystal Restaurant. This fine-dining establishment overlooks the bustling marina and is open for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Enjoy a piping hot cup of coffee or tea at the tranquil Krystal Bar, which is situated adjacent to the restaurant, or move further down the boardwalk and enjoy a cocktail or craft beer at Oh La La Cocktail Lounge. A trendy spot with a picturesque setting, Oh La La Cocktail Lounge serves an enticing selection of light bar snacks, cocktails and gourmet milkshakes.
